name: Sealed dossier (engagement / regulatory / investor)
notes: Comprehensive sealed deliverable. Multi-page; tagged PDF; sha256 manifest sidecar. Composed of components: cover-page / executive-summary / methodology / findings / appendix / signature-block.

name: Cover email (introducing a deliverable)
notes: Brief; warm; evidence-first. Composed of components: greeting / context-anchor / hook / body / CTA / signature.

name: Intro message (cold or warm outreach)
notes: Channel-bound conversational opener. Composed of components: hook / personalisation-anchor / 1-line-pitch / qualifying-question or CTA.

name: Founding deck (full company narrative)
quality_fabric_invocation: fabric.compose() emphasising scenario:fundraise + brand visual depth
notes: 14-slide founding deck. Composed of components: cover-slide / problem-slide / solution-slide / market-slide / traction-slide / team-slide / ask-slide / appendix-slide.

name: Advisor handoff pack
notes: 4-12 slide adviser-engagement-specific pack. Composed of components: brief-cover / open-questions / context-anchor / requested-decisions / signature-block.

name: Engagement deck (proposal / pitch)
notes: 8-15 slide proposal/pitch deck. Composed of components: cover-slide / counterparty-anchor (translated externally per BRAND_BASELINE_REALITY_MATRIX.md) / problem-slide / proposed-engagement-slide / scope-slide / pricing-slide.

name: UAT report (sign-off evidence)
notes: Class-aware UAT report. Composed of components: scope-summary / step-table / verdict-row-per-step / evidence-links-block / sign-off-block.

name: Standard Operating Procedure
notes: Per akos-executable-process-catalog.mdc RULE 1: every executable process gets a paired human-readable SOP + agent-facing runbook. Composed of components: purpose / scope / inputs / steps / outputs / failure-modes / cross-references.

name: Runbook script (executable counterpart of an SOP)
render_script_path: n/a (the artifact is itself the script)
doctrine_owner_role: role_owner per area;System Owner for cross-area
notes: Per akos-executable-process-catalog.mdc RULE 1 paired runbook. Output is OT-PROSE-MARKDOWN (docstring) plus Python source. Composed of components: docstring-header / Pydantic-models / typed-functions / structured-logging / tests-pair (tests/test_<module>.py).

name: Canonical CSV register (SSOT for a dimension)
render_script_path: n/a (read at canonical path);scripts/validate_<dim>.py for FK
doctrine_owner_role: role_owner per area;System Owner for cross-area
notes: Governance backbone. Per akos-holistika-operations.mdc new-canonical-register pattern. Composed of components: header-row / row-per-entity / FK-columns / status-column / metadata-columns (added_at + last_review_at + last_review_by + last_review_decision_id + methodology_version_at_review + notes per RULE updated 2026-05-20).

name: Decision log row in DECISION_REGISTER.csv
notes: Per akos-planning-traceability.mdc + akos-inline-ratification.mdc D-IH-NN-X precedent. Composed of components: decision_id / decision_date / question / chosen_option / rejected_options / rationale / source / linked-canonicals / decision_source.

name: Initiative master-roadmap (charter + phases + decisions + risks)
render_script_path: n/a (read at canonical path);Cursor-plans path mirrored
notes: Long-running initiative blueprint. Composed of components: charter-frontmatter / phase-dependency-mermaid / per-phase-deep-section / decision-preview-table / risk-preview-table / cross-references.

name: Candidate initiative file (pre-promotion)
notes: Per akos-conflict-surfacing-and-blocker-trackers.mdc Option-5 default posture. Composed of components: operating-story / activation-gates / phase-overview / open-conundrums / cross-references.

name: Phase pause record (operator hand-off)
notes: Per akos-agent-checkpoint-discipline.mdc operator-pause-point contract. Composed of components: mechanical-evidence / documentary-evidence / pre-next-phase-self-checkpoint / operator-approval-checklist.

name: Wave closure report (multi-task push completion)
quality_fabric_invocation: fabric.compose() emphasising governance:research-enrichment-subsection per akos-applied-research-discipline.mdc RULE 3
notes: Per akos-applied-research-discipline.mdc RULE 3. Composed of components: scope-summary / decisions-ratified / files-modified / canonicals-edited / research-enrichment-subsection / forward-charter-pointers.

name: Operator inbox dashboard (HLK-ERP daily-driver view)
notes: Decision-surfacing dashboard. Composed of components: pending-ratify-list / blocker-tracker-list / pause-record-list / decision-pinned-list / search-bar.

name: PMO hub auto-rendered view
notes: Per Initiative 25 P8 batch render. Composed of components: program-overview / topic-graph / phase-gantt / decision-log-feed / risk-heatmap. render_pmo_hub batches the index; render_topic_graph renders per-topic subviews; render_operational_cohesion_index renders the operational cohesion governance index per OPERATIONAL_COHESION_DOCTRINE.md (Initiative 86 Wave J derivative).

name: WIP dashboard (active engagement state-of-the-world)
notes: Engagement and adviser inflight roll-up. Composed of components: engagement-list / adviser-handoff-list / next-actions-list / blockers-list.

name: Counterparty brief (internal-register CORPINT companion)
quality_fabric_invocation: fabric.compose() emphasising audience:J-OP + brand:CORPINT-internal-register per akos-brand-baseline-reality.mdc
notes: Per akos-brand-baseline-reality.mdc dual-register contract. Composed of components: counterparty-overview / approach-techniques / elicitation-design / reliability-grading / baseline-reality-assessment.

name: Objections brief (internal-register CORPINT companion)
notes: Per akos-brand-baseline-reality.mdc dual-register contract. Composed of components: anticipated-objections-table / counter-evidence-per-objection / fallback-positions / escalation-paths.

name: Press kit (broadcast-distribution evidence pack)
render_script_path: n/a (assembled per release);scripts/render_dossier.py for sealed PDF parts
quality_fabric_invocation: fabric.compose() emphasising audience:J-PT/J-CO + brand:full-visual-depth + channel:CHAN-AD-CAMPAIGN if applicable
notes: Future artifact class for press releases / collaborator broadcasts. Composed of components: release-narrative / boilerplate-block / quote-block / image-bank / contact-info / sealed-pdf.
